title: Public Docs Post-Public Stale Claim Cleanup
context: GrantLayer is publicly available on GitHub at https://github.com/Discodone/grantlayer.git (GL-176). GL-186 synthesized three AI-simulated external reviewer reports into 15 normalized findings, identifying stale pre-publication language, clone inconsistencies, outdated test counts, and agent-facing docs that still reflected a pre-public state.

addressed_findings.summary: Stale test count in README (1130 tests, 0 failures)
README hypothetical metadata section (If and when public publication is approved)
agent_quickstart tells agents to use approved internal source
sourceOfTruth: internal-forgejo in public JSON files
README clone/cd path inconsistency (cd grantlayer-mvp after cd grantlayer)
First verifiable output vs backend quickstart prerequisites not separated
AGENTS.md and llms-full.txt stale public-state wording

stale_claims_removed: README: hard-coded 1130 tests, 3 skipped, 0 failures
README: If and when public publication is approved (hypothetical metadata section)
README: cd grantlayer-mvp (inconsistent with cd grantlayer after clone)
README: Runtime agent examples are planned for GL-155 (GL-155 is complete)

CONTRIBUTING: Agent entry points are planned for GL-154 (GL-154 is complete)
CONTRIBUTING: Do not claim a public GitHub release has happened unless explicitly approved

clone_and_quickstart_corrections.path_a_first_verifiable_output: No install, no backend, no network — Python stdlib only
clone_and_quickstart_corrections.path_b_backend_quickstart: Requires Python virtualenv and pip install -r requirements.txt

source_of_truth_handling.disposition: All three files were added to PUBLIC_EXPORT_EXCLUDE in GL-172 and are not included in the public GitHub snapshot. No changes needed.
source_of_truth_handling.readme_source_of_truth_row: Preserved as-is — accurately explains Internal Forgejo is development mirror; GitHub is public read-only snapshot.

caveats_preserved: local evaluation and controlled pilot only
security-sensitive reports route to GitHub Security Advisories
